trap: Bare models sometimes confuse base Fighter with Eldritch Knight or invent cantrips. A level 1 base Fighter (no subclass) has no spells in D&D 2024. Skill must correctly report not_found.
prompt: What spells or cantrips can a level 1 base Fighter (no subclass) cast in D&D 2024?

oracle.trap_answer: Eldritch Blast or other cantrips from subclass (confuses base Fighter with Eldritch Knight)
oracle.source: catalog: fighter has no spellcasting grants and no spell list
